daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders today, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings pulling you toward something new—they're picking up on frequencies others are missing. Time to lean into your mystical superpower.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether it's deepening an existing connection or attracting fresh energy, your empathetic vibe is magnetic rn. Don't overthink it—just feel it.
daily.career: Your creative ideas have legs today. That project or pitch you've been sitting on? The universe is signaling it's ready to move. Channel your natural adaptability into action and watch momentum build.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding energy—maybe a walk outside, stretching, or just unplugging for a bit. Honor that whisper. Your nervous system will thank you for slowing down intentionally.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
